function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T1 -> T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_total[T0](x0) or not lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T1, T0](x1) or lib(relation_basic).is_total[T1](lib(relation_transport).relation_pullback[T1, T0](x1, x0)) } }
function[T0: lib(comm_ring).CommRing] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not lib(ideal).is_ideal[T0](x0) or lib(ideal).ideal_sum[T0](x0, x0, x1) = x0(x1) } }
function[T0: lib(comm_ring).CommRing] { forall(x0: lib(ideal).Ideal[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[lib(ideal).Ideal[T0]](x0) != lib(ideal).Ideal.new[T0](x1) or x2 ∈ x0 = x1(x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x2: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x3: T0 -> T1, x4: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x0 != x3 or x2 != x4 or lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x3, x1, x4) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x2: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x3: T0 -> T1, x4: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x0 != x3 or exists(k0: T1) { x2(k0) != x4(k0) } or lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x3, x1, x4) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x2: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x3: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x4: T0 -> T1) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x2 != x3 or exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x4(k0) } or lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x4, x1, x3) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(nat).Nat -> lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { not forall(x1: lib(nat).Nat) { x0(x1.suc) ⊂ x0(x1) } or lib(set).is_increasing[T0](lib(set).seq_complement[T0](x0)) } }
identity_subgroup[G] = group_hom_kernel[G, H](f) != is_trivial_group_hom_kernel[G, H](f)
group_hom_kernel[G, H](f) = identity_subgroup[G] or is_trivial_group_hom_kernel[G, H](f)
group_hom_kernel[G, H](f) != identity_subgroup[G] or not is_trivial_group_hom_kernel[G, H](f)
